response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in production routing or geospatial data pipelines, and his recent work is dominated by TypeScript/Node.js — raising concerns about his current proficiency in the required systems programming stack.
strengths: Proven geospatial experience via open-source GISCollective platform
Strong systems-level exposure through DLang, Linux, and low-latency app development
Demonstrated ability to learn and contribute across diverse technical stacks
concerns: No visible commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing or map tile pipelines
Recent roles focus on TypeScript/Node.js, not the core C++ requirement
Limited evidence of distributed systems or real-time traffic integration work
